heading: Payment of claims
label: 7108 Payment of claims
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)710841:612., , ; , , .Pub. L. 95–563, § 1392 Stat. 2389Pub. L. 104–106, div. D, title XLIII, § 4322(b)(7)110 Stat. 677Nov. 1, 1978Feb. 10, 1996
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)710841:612., , ; , , .Pub. L. 95–563, § 1392 Stat. 2389Pub. L. 104–106, div. D, title XLIII, § 4322(b)(7)110 Stat. 677Nov. 1, 1978Feb. 10, 1996

children.heading: .—Judgments
children.label: a .—Judgments
children.text: Any judgment against the Federal Government on a claim under this chapter shall be paid promptly in accordance with the procedures provided by .section 1304 of title 31

children.heading: .—Monetary Awards
children.label: b .—Monetary Awards
children.text: Any monetary award to a contractor by an agency board shall be paid promptly in accordance with the procedures contained in subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Reimbursement
children.label: c .—Reimbursement
children.text: Payments made pursuant to subsections (a) and (b) shall be reimbursed to the fund provided by by the agency whose appropriations were used for the contract out of available amounts or by obtaining additional appropriations for purposes of reimbursement.section 1304 of title 31

children.heading: .—Judgments
children.label: 1 .—Judgments
children.text: Notwithstanding subsections (a) to (c), any judgment against the Tennessee Valley Authority on a claim under this chapter shall be paid promptly in accordance with section 9(b) of the Tennessee Valley Authority Act of 1933 ().16 U.S.C. 831h(b)

children.heading: .—Monetary awards
children.label: 2 .—Monetary awards
children.text: Notwithstanding subsections (a) to (c), any monetary award to a contractor by the board of contract appeals of the Tennessee Valley Authority shall be paid in accordance with section 9(b) of the Tennessee Valley Authority Act of 1933 ().16 U.S.C. 831h(b)
